0077.issue: [E0077] "eslint.config.mjs" should use installed "@iobroker/eslint-config" via `import config from '@iobroker/eslint-config';`.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.volvo/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
